case_title: SONJA ENGLER VS. PAUL BARBAGELATA ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENGLER, SONJA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PAUL BARBAGELATA HOLSTEN, JOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-04-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOLSTEN, JOAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF SONJA ENGLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN BARBAGELATA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOAN HOLSTEN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
